businessSummary.oneLiner: Southeast Asia's largest internet platform — Shopee (e-commerce), SeaMoney (fintech), Garena (gaming) triple engine
businessSummary.description: Sea Limited is a Southeast Asian, Latin American, and global consumer internet company operating Shopee (e-commerce), SeaMoney (digital finance), and Garena (gaming). FY2025 revenue $22.94B (+36.4% YoY), net income $1.58B (+255%). Friday close $86.00 (flat). Morgan Stanley cut target to $121, BofA cut to $125. Logistics cost +43.2% increase remains the key concern. Trading sideways near 52-week low of $77.05. Forward P/E 20.23x — historically undervalued for the growth rate. Market cap $50.66B.
howTheyMakeMoney: E-commerce (Shopee): Southeast Asia's #1 marketplace — GMV commissions, advertising, logistics (~64% of revenue)
Fintech (SeaMoney): SPayLater, SeaBank — lending, payments, insurance (~21% of revenue)
Gaming (Garena): Free Fire — global battle royale, in-game purchases (~15% of revenue)

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Reflects +255% net income growth. Reasonable for SE Asian platform

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Attractive for the growth rate. Discount to MercadoLibre

keyMetrics.name: Q4 Revenue
keyMetrics.interpretation: All-time high. But logistics costs +43.2% increase is concerning

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Reinvestment strategy compressing margins. Long-term expansion expected

growthDrivers.title: Seeking Alpha Strong Buy $136 — 'Short-Term Pain, Long-Term Gain'
growthDrivers.description: Seeking Alpha (3/9): Buy at $95, target $136 (+42%). Logistics reinvestment builds long-term moat. Near-term margin compression is intentional strategy.

growthDrivers.title: Logistics + Brazil Reinvestment — 2x Fulfillment Penetration Target
growthDrivers.description: Simply Wall St (3/9): Shopee GMV +25% guidance + 2x fulfillment network expansion + VIP program Brazil launch. TikTok Shop competition response.

growthDrivers.title: FY2025 Net Income +255% — Profitability Dramatically Proven
growthDrivers.description: Net income $1.58B (from FY2024's $0.44B, +255%). Revenue $22.94B (+36.4%). Complete transformation from losses to massive profitability.

growthDrivers.title: Forward P/E 20.23x — Historically Undervalued for Growth Rate
growthDrivers.description: +36% revenue growth at Forward P/E 20.23x. Lowest valuation level among SE Asian internet platforms.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: Southeast Asia's largest e-commerce (Shopee) + fintech (SeaMoney) + gaming (Garena) triangular ecosystem. 'Amazon of the East' positioning.

moats.description: Shopee is the largest by GMV in Southeast Asia. Self-built logistics network.
700M Southeast Asian population, Latin American expansion. Young digital native market.

competitors.name: Lazada (Alibaba)
competitors.detail: SE Asian e-commerce #2. Alibaba reducing investment

competitors.name: TikTok Shop
competitors.detail: Social commerce offensive. Rapidly penetrating Southeast Asia

competitors.name: MercadoLibre
competitors.detail: Latin American e-commerce #1. Brazil market competition

competitors.name: Grab Holdings
competitors.detail: SE Asian super app. Fintech competition

recentNews.headline: Morgan Stanley Cuts SE Target to $121 — Investment Cost Concerns
recentNews.significance: Investing.com: Morgan Stanley maintains Overweight but cuts $173→$121. BofA also cuts $150→$125. Logistics reinvestment costs pressuring near-term earnings.

recentNews.headline: Simply Wall St: SE Valuation Check After Recent Price Weakness
recentNews.significance: Past month -17.8%, YTD -32.2% decline. Valuation reassessment. Underlying financial profile remains strong.

recentNews.headline: Seeking Alpha: SE Strong Buy $136 — Short-Term Pain, Long-Term Gain
recentNews.significance: Logistics reinvestment as long-term moat. Forward P/E 20x, target $136 (+42%). Market overreaction analysis.

recentNews.headline: Sea Reinvests in Logistics and Brazil as Shares Trade Below Targets
recentNews.significance: Simply Wall St: Fulfillment network reinvestment expansion. Shopee GMV +25% guidance. Seller incentives + VIP Brazil expansion.

recentNews.headline: TipRanks: Sea Earnings Call Shows Profitable Growth Pivot
recentNews.significance: 2026 Shopee EBITDA at least flat, GMV +25%. Fulfillment penetration 2x target. Investor concern vs long-term strategy.

analystOpinions.notableComment: StockAnalysis: 11 analysts Strong Buy $179.54 (+109%). Morgan Stanley: Overweight maintained, $173→$121 cut. BofA: $150→$125 cut. Seeking Alpha: Strong Buy $136. Target cuts but all maintain Buy.

risks.title: Morgan Stanley/BofA Back-to-Back Target Cuts — Margin Pressure
risks.description: MS $173→$121, BofA $150→$125. Logistics cost +43.2% increase is the primary driver for FY2026-28 EPS downgrades.

risks.title: TikTok Shop Competition Intensifying — SE Asian Social Commerce Threat
risks.description: TikTok Shop rapidly gaining market share in Southeast Asia. Direct threat to Shopee's core market.

risks.title: YTD -32% Decline — Deteriorating Investor Sentiment
risks.description: Post-Q4 earnings biggest single-day drop. Trading sideways near 52-week low $77.05. Additional downside risk.

risks.title: Brazil Competition — MercadoLibre Home Advantage
risks.description: MercadoLibre competition in Latin American expansion. Brand awareness disadvantage vs local player.

risks.title: Share Dilution +5.54% YoY — Per-Share Value Dilution
risks.description: Continuous share issuance diluting existing shareholders. Limiting per-share earnings growth.

buyReasons.title: Forward P/E 20.23x — Historically Undervalued at 36% Growth
buyReasons.rationale: SE Asian internet leader trading at value stock valuation. MS/BofA cut targets but both maintain Buy.

buyReasons.title: All 11 Analysts Buy/Strong Buy — +109% Upside to Target
buyReasons.rationale: Consensus $179.54. Target cuts but 'Buy' consensus unchanged. Extreme divergence between price and analyst view.

buyReasons.title: FY2025 Net Income +255% — Profitability Proven
buyReasons.rationale: From losses to $1.58B net income. Business model profitability confirmed.

buyReasons.title: 700M SE Asian Population — Structural Growth Market
buyReasons.rationale: Young digital native population. E-commerce and fintech penetration in early stages.

overallOpinion: Sea Limited faces back-to-back target cuts from Morgan Stanley ($121) and BofA ($125), yet both maintain 'Buy'. Forward P/E 20.23x, consensus +109% — extreme divergence between market price and analyst valuations.

Seeking Alpha: 'Short-term pain, long-term gain'. Logistics reinvestment is TikTok Shop defense + fulfillment moat building. Shopee GMV +25% guidance indicates sustained growth, margin recovery possible.
RSI 33 oversold, near 52-week low. Technical bounce conditions forming. However, $77 support break would open further downside. Attractive entry for patient long-term investors.

sources.name: Seeking Alpha
sources.description: Strong Buy $136, short-term pain long-term gain

threads.hook: SE targets getting slashed left and right, yet everyone says 'Buy'? 🤔
threads.text: MS $121, BofA $125 — target cuts. But all 11 analysts Buy. Forward P/E 20x, consensus $179 (+109%). RSI 33 oversold. Is the market wrong? 🔗 investory.kro.kr/stock/SE/analysis/2026-03-14
